changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_USERS START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1 NOCACHE NOCYCLE

changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE USERS ( ID NUMBER NOT NULL, NAME VARCHAR2(150) NOT NULL, EMAIL VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL, PASSWORD_HASH VARCHAR2(255), CEFR_LEVEL VARCHAR2(2) DEFAULT 'A1', TIMEZONE VARCHAR2(50) DEFAULT 'America/Sao_Paulo', STREAK_DAYS NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, LAST_STUDY_DATE DATE, CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, UPDATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, ACTIVE NUMBER(1) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_USERS PRIMARY KEY (ID), CONSTRAINT UQ_USERS_EMAIL UNIQUE (EMAIL), CONSTRAINT CK_USERS_CEFR CHECK (CEFR_LEVEL IN ('A1','A2','B1','B2','C1','C2')), CONSTRAINT CK_USERS_ACTIVE CHECK (ACTIVE IN (0, 1)), CONSTRAINT CK_USERS_STREAK CHECK (STREAK_DAYS >= 0) )
